drop_reason: Instruction is literally 'check about the code review comments by coderabbit, PR #25' — requires fetching live PR review state from GitHub, which violates the task selection criteria ('No required live PR/issue writes' / 'Outputs reconstructible from repo diff or public artifacts' — CodeRabbit comments are not in the diff). 1-line user question with no testable spec. Patch touches 5 files (CLAUDE.md, site.config.ts, site.config.example.ts, src/app/layout.tsx, src/components/Footer.tsx) with no added tests, and FAIL_TO_PASS is empty. There is no fixed acceptance contract — the agent's job is to read external review comments and react.
notes: Even if web access was allowed, the CodeRabbit comments may have been edited or deleted since, and they are private to the PR. Canonical fidelity is also weak — '+46/-15' across mixed files.
